items.caption: A slide from a presentation, focusing on the topic of cookies. the slide is titled "cookies" and contains bullet points explaining what cookies are and how they are used. the text states that cookies are text files stored on the client computer for various information tracking purposes. it also mentions that java servlets support http cookies. the slide outlines three steps involved in identifying returning users: a server script sends a set of cookies to the browser, the browser stores this information on local machine for future use, and the server sends a request + those cookies to the server and uses that information to identify the user. the slide includes a diagram with three arrows labeled "request," "response (set-cookie:c1)," and "web server," illustrating the flow of information. the slide is numbered "41" and is dated "comp9321, 1752, week 2."
